heading: Train With Me

offerings.title: Private Sessions
offerings.description: One-on-one or small group instruction at my home location, or yours within Metro Manila and Cavite.

offerings.title: Regular Training
offerings.description: Join Lapunti Karilyon's Sunday sessions at UP Diliman. Beginner-friendly, progressive curriculum.

offerings.title: Group Sessions
offerings.description: Minimum 4 students. Available within Metro Manila and Cavite. Special session rates plus travel and accommodation expenses apply.

offerings.title: Personal Students
offerings.description: Accepting students who cannot train at Lapunti Karilyon. With permission to establish child groups or schools under the Lapunti Karilyon umbrella.

note: Open to seminar opportunities with sufficient lead time for preparation.
